title: Light Blanch Japanese Noodle Noodles
description: A light and refreshing Japanese noodle dish featuring blanched brown rice noodles. Perfect for a light meal or snack, this dish is also Ayurveda-friendly.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Add the brown rice noodles and cook for 3 minutes, or until slightly tender.
Drain the noodles and immediately plunge them into an ice bath to stop cooking.
While the noodles are cooling, heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
